title: Balanced Energy
subtitle: Supporting steady nourishment
description: As your body continues to support growth, your energy and nutritional needs increase. Focusing on balanced portions and nutrient-dense meals can help maintain steady energy and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Increased need for energy and nourishment
Consistent appetite with possible hunger between meals
Greater importance of balanced meal portions
nutrition_focus: Support sustained energy with regular meals and snacks
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, or curd
Protein sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or overeating in one sitting
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or lemon water
reassurance: Balanced portions and regular meals help keep your energy steady and support your body.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balanced portion control and regular meals help maintain stable blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Eat controlled portions at regular intervals
Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
Avoid overeating or long gaps between meals
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Balanced portions support steady energy levels.

anemia.personalized_description: Nutrient-dense meals with iron-rich foods help support energy and strength.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent and nutrient-rich meals support your energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced meals help maintain a calm and steady routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent and nutrient-dense meals support overall metabolic balance.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and balance support your body's needs.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, maintaining balanced portions and nutrient-dense meals helps support stability and energy.
priority_nutrition: Maintain regular meal and snack timings
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Balanced nourishment supports your energy and overall well-being.
